data.name: FANCY!
data.detailed_description:
PROJECT: STELLAR GIRLS


Project: Mirror


關於此遊戲

Gameplay






FANCY! is an exciting puzzle game with delicious, sweet candy combinations! You will find many bright and varied visuals and very beautiful music. In this game you need to correctly match the same candies in a row so that they disappear (no matter in which direction), collect points, and open new levels. After each completed level, you will discover new pictures ! Collect the required number of points and conquer one level after another!





With "FANCY!" You will be able to breathe from difficult games, you will immerse yourself in the world of various, colorful candies and nice music. Here you will find an amazing variety of new levels, a beautiful gallery, animation and pleasant music! Collecting colorful candies will become more and more interesting with each new level! Enjoy an interesting game! Many interesting levels with stunning graphics are waiting for you!



What you can find in this game:


  • Challenging and interesting levels at the same time.
  • Incredible graphics and animation.
  • Incredible sound and visual effects.
  • Funny levels.
  • Relax and have a great time.
  • Enjoy your day with cute girls.

data.short_description: FANCY! is an exciting puzzle game with delicious, sweet candy combinations! In the game FANCY! You will find many bright and varied visuals and very beautiful music.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
